# CarePortal

> CarePortal is a healthcare dashboard demo — patient records, clinical timeline, and AI-driven insights. A public showcase by Daniel Tofan.

## Links

- [CarePortal (live demo)](https://danieltofan.github.io/patient-medical-records-vue/): Healthcare dashboard demo with patient records, timeline, and AI insights.
- [Daniel Tofan](https://danieltofan.ai/): Engineering leader, fractional CTO, and AI specialist.
